title: Path-Based Routing with Ingress
description:
Route HTTP traffic to two different services based on URL path using a single Ingress resource.

Deploy an `httpd` API service and an `nginx` web service, each as a ClusterIP. Create one Ingress that routes `/api` to the API service and `/web` to the web service.

**Common Pitfalls**: Use `pathType: Prefix` — `Exact` will miss sub-paths like `/api/v1`. Both backend Services must exist before the Ingress controller will mark them healthy. Verify with `kubectl describe ingress` that both backends show up.
steps: Create a Deployment named api-deploy using image httpd:alpine with 1 replica
Create a ClusterIP Service named api-service on port 80 targeting api-deploy pods
Create a Deployment named web-deploy using image nginx:alpine with 1 replica
Create a ClusterIP Service named web-service on port 80 targeting web-deploy pods
Create an Ingress named path-ingress with two rules: path /api (Prefix) → api-service:80, path /web (Prefix) → web-service:80
Set ingressClassName to nginx on the Ingress
hints: Use app: api-deploy and app: web-deploy as Pod labels so Services can select them
pathType: Prefix on /api also matches /api/v1, /api/users, etc.
kubectl describe ingress path-ingress shows the backends and whether the controller resolved them
Both Deployments must have their Pods Running before the controller considers the backends healthy

editor_config.initial_code:
# Deployment: API service (httpd)
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: api-deploy
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: # TODO: use 'api-deploy'
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: # TODO: use 'api-deploy'
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: api
        image: # TODO: httpd alpine image
        ports:
        - containerPort: 80
---
# Service: API
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: api-service
spec:
  selector:
    app: api-deploy
  ports:
  - port: 80
    targetPort: 80
---
# Deployment: Web service (nginx)
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: web-deploy
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: # TODO: use 'web-deploy'
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: # TODO: use 'web-deploy'
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: web
        image: # TODO: nginx alpine image
        ports:
        - containerPort: 80
---
# Service: Web
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: web-service
spec:
  selector:
    app: web-deploy
  ports:
  - port: 80
    targetPort: 80
---
# Ingress: path-based routing
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: Ingress
metadata:
  name: path-ingress
spec:
  ingressClassName: nginx
  rules:
  - http:
      paths:
      - path: /api
        pathType: Prefix
        backend:
          service:
            name: api-service
            port:
              number: 80
      - path: /web
        pathType: Prefix
        backend:
          service:
            name: web-service
            port:
              number: 80

_solution.code_solution:
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: api-deploy
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-deploy
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: api-deploy
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: api
        image: httpd:alpine
        ports:
        - containerPort: 80
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: api-service
spec:
  selector:
    app: api-deploy
  ports:
  - port: 80
    targetPort: 80
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: web-deploy
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: web-deploy
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: web-deploy
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: web
        image: nginx:alpine
        ports:
        - containerPort: 80
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: web-service
spec:
  selector:
    app: web-deploy
  ports:
  - port: 80
    targetPort: 80
---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: Ingress
metadata:
  name: path-ingress
spec:
  ingressClassName: nginx
  rules:
  - http:
      paths:
      - path: /api
        pathType: Prefix
        backend:
          service:
            name: api-service
            port:
              number: 80
      - path: /web
        pathType: Prefix
        backend:
          service:
            name: web-service
            port:
              number: 80
_solution.validation_script:
#!/bin/bash
set -e

kubectl apply -f solution.yaml

# Wait for deployments
kubectl rollout status deployment/api-deploy --timeout=60s
kubectl rollout status deployment/web-deploy --timeout=60s
echo "✓ Both Deployments are ready"

# Verify services exist
kubectl get service api-service > /dev/null 2>&1 && echo "✓ api-service exists" || { echo "✗ api-service not found"; exit 1; }
kubectl get service web-service > /dev/null 2>&1 && echo "✓ web-service exists" || { echo "✗ web-service not found"; exit 1; }

# Verify Ingress exists
kubectl get ingress path-ingress > /dev/null 2>&1 && echo "✓ Ingress path-ingress exists" || { echo "✗ Ingress path-ingress not found"; exit 1; }

# Check ingressClassName
class=$(kubectl get ingress path-ingress -o jsonpath='{.spec.ingressClassName}')
if [ "$class" = "nginx" ]; then
  echo "✓ ingressClassName is nginx"
else
  echo "✗ ingressClassName is '$class', expected 'nginx'"
  exit 1
fi

# Check paths
paths=$(kubectl get ingress path-ingress -o jsonpath='{.spec.rules[0].http.paths[*].path}')
if echo "$paths" | grep -q "/api" && echo "$paths" | grep -q "/web"; then
  echo "✓ Both /api and /web paths are defined"
else
  echo "✗ Missing expected paths. Found: $paths"
  exit 1
fi

# Check pathTypes
ptypes=$(kubectl get ingress path-ingress -o jsonpath='{.spec.rules[0].http.paths[*].pathType}')
if echo "$ptypes" | grep -q "Prefix"; then
  echo "✓ pathType Prefix is set"
else
  echo "✗ pathType should be Prefix, got: $ptypes"
  exit 1
fi

echo "✓ All validations passed"
exit 0
